message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "ScooterOwner" as ScooterOwner
interface "Dashboard" as Dashboard
boundary "BikeService" as BikeService
boundary "ClaimsService" as ClaimsService
entity "bike" as bike
entity "Claim" as Claim

activate ScooterOwner
ScooterOwner -> Dashboard : lockBike
activate Dashboard
Dashboard -> BikeService : lockBike(bike)
activate BikeService
BikeService -> bike : lockBike(bike)
activate bike
bike --> BikeService : bike
deactivate bike
BikeService --> Dashboard : bike
deactivate BikeService
Dashboard --> ScooterOwner : bike
deactivate Dashboard

ScooterOwner -> Dashboard : unlockBike
activate Dashboard
Dashboard -> BikeService : unlockBike(bike)
activate BikeService
BikeService -> bike : unlockBike(bike)
activate bike
bike --> BikeService : bike
deactivate bike
BikeService --> Dashboard : bike
deactivate BikeService
Dashboard --> ScooterOwner : bike
deactivate Dashboard

@enduml
